# render-detail

Renders the slots facet as a section in the plugin detail pane: one row per slot showing `group.member` and its slot id.

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:BEGIN — do not edit; regenerated by `./singularity build` -->

## Plugin reference

- Description: Per-plugin slots section in the plugin detail pane.
- Web:
  - Contributes: `PluginViewSlots.Section` "slots" → `SlotsDetailSection`
